runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "PHP", "build_system": "Composer", "package_manager": "Composer", "build_commands": ["composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist --no-dev"], "install_commands": ["apt-get update", "apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl unzip zip", "rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*", "php -r 'copy(\\\"https://getcomposer.org/installer\\\", \\\"composer-setup.php\\\");' && php composer-setup.php --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer && php -r 'unlink(\\\"composer-setup.php\\\");'"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "8.2", "system_packages": ["git", "curl", "unzip", "zip"]}, "repo_type": "framework", "base_image": "php:8.2.30-cli-trixie", "base_image_rationale": "Selected PHP 8.2 CLI image from official Docker images to align with the project\u2019s PHP requirement and provide a stable command-line environment.", "pitfalls": ["No -slim PHP 8.2 variant is available in the provided official images; expect a larger image size.", "If you need dev dependencies for testing, remove --no-dev from the build and ensure license compliance.", "bin/build-phar.sh assumes presence of box.json.gh-release; ensure it exists or skip phar build step in Dockerfile."], "notes": "This blueprint targets a PHP CLI environment suitable for PhpBench usage; consider multi-stage builds to cache composer dependencies and minimize final image size."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
FROM php:8.2.30-cli-trixie

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl unzip zip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Composer
RUN php -r "copy('https://getcomposer.org/installer', 'composer-setup.php');" \
    && php composer-setup.php --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer \
    && php -r "unlink('composer-setup.php');"

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy source code
COPY . .

# Install PHP dependencies (production only; no dev)
RUN composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist --no-dev

# Optional: build Phar for distribution (requires network access to box)
# RUN /bin/bash bin/build-phar.sh

# Default command: run PHPBench via PHP interpreter to avoid shebang issues
CMD ["php", "bin/phpbench"]

FROM php:8.2.30-cli-trixie

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git curl unzip zip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Composer
RUN php -r "copy('https://getcomposer.org/installer', 'composer-setup.php');" \
    && php composer-setup.php --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer \
    && php -r "unlink('composer-setup.php');"

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy source code
COPY . .

# Install PHP dependencies (production only; no dev)
RUN composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist --no-dev

# Optional: build Phar for distribution (requires network access to box)
# RUN /bin/bash bin/build-phar.sh

# Default command: run PHPBench via PHP interpreter to avoid shebang issues
CMD ["php", "bin/phpbench"]
